name: PgaStatusPollerTool
description: Polls all Partner Government Agencies (FDA, USDA, EPA, FWS, CBP) to get their import admission status for a given shipment. Returns the worst-case overall PGA status (APPROVED, MAY_HOLD, or REFUSED) along with per-agency results as JSON. Call this tool in Phase 2 after researching agency requirements.

in_PgaAgencies.description: JSON array of PGA agency codes to poll (e.g. ["FDA","USDA","EPA"])

in_PoNumber.description: Purchase order number for the shipment being screened

out_PgaStatus.description: Overall PGA status: APPROVED, MAY_HOLD, or REFUSED (worst-case roll-up)

out_PgaStatusJson.description: Full JSON with per-agency results including status, portal URL, and reference code

out_AffectedAgencies.description: Comma-separated list of agencies with non-APPROVED status

out_ReportStoragePath.description: Storage bucket path where the PGA status report JSON was uploaded
